result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was added to `src/Program.cs`:

- **`status`** — prints `Staged files:` with listed files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists by blob hash, prints `Added:`, `Removed:`, `Modified:`
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from blob store, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to target commit without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes file from index, errors if not present
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata plus indented file list with `Files:` header

A helper `ParseCommitFiles()` was added to avoid duplicating the commit-parsing logic across `diff`, `checkout`, and `show`.
